The '''''Rancor's Tooth''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that operated as a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==History==
The ''Rancor's Tooth'' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that was commissioned by [[Orax Tazaene]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] transferred into service as a [[Rebel privateer|privateer]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the vessel was used to help establish the [[Echo Base/Legends|Rebel base]] on<ref name="JKTCG" /> the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|location|hoth|Hoth}}</ref> of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
